entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop, Arachis hypogaea L., studied for nitrogen fixation traits.

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to evaluate the ability of parents to pass on traits to offspring.

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia, specifically N2-fixation in peanut.

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSS
entities.description: A mating design where all possible combinations of parents are crossed to study genetic variance.

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENETIC VARIANCE
entities.description: Genetic variance that is not due to the additive effects of alleles, often involving dominance or epistasis.

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The activity of the enzyme nitrogenase, used as a biochemical measure of nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: NC AC 2821
entities.description: A specific peanut germplasm line identified as having high general combining ability.

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average effect of a genotype in combination with other genotypes.

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in the plant tissue.

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves of the plant.

entities.name: TOP WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the aerial parts of the plant.

entities.name: NODULE NUMBER
entities.description: The number of root nodules formed on the plant.

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root nodules.

entities.name: ROOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the root system of the plant.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production of the crop.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve crop traits through selection and crossing.
